title: cumbia niedenzuana
intro: Cumbia niedenzuana, also known as 'Cumbia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cumbia include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Cumbia is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its leaves are used in topical applications, such as poultices or infusions, to treat various health conditions.
